qas.q: Types of track for loading and unloading tank cars
qas.a: Spur and Bypass

qas.a: 100 feet

qas.a: 2 CO2 fire extinguishers should be within 5-10 feet of car

qas.q: How far apart should tank cars be?
qas.a: 25 feet minimum, preferably 50 feet

qas.a:
12x15"

all other letters 2" high

qas.q: Type of coupling used for bottom loading/unloading when overseas
qas.a: Gossler Coupling

qas.a: In an emergency or by order of the base commander

qas.a: 50 feet

qas.a: 3/4 full

qas.a: 3-5 minutes

qas.a: 15 minutes

equipment
